description.zh-Hans: 通过归一化时间参数生成动态帧序列图案。每个像素使用基于正弦的函数，结合位置相关频率和噪声偏移进行振荡，产生类似有机动画的效果。支持三种播放模式：循环、往复和单次。
description.en: Generates animated frame sequence patterns driven by a normalized time parameter. Each pixel oscillates using sin-based functions with position-dependent frequencies and noise-derived offsets, creating organic animation-like effects. Supports three playback modes: loop, ping-pong, and single-shot.

triggers.zh-Hans: 帧序列, 动画帧, 帧动画, 序列帧
triggers.en: frame sequence, animation frames, frame animation

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 配合参数动画节点，生成动态循环的帧序列用于像素动画。
exampleUsage.en: Use with ParameterAnimation node to generate looping frame sequences for pixel animation.
